name: Butterscotch Fondue
recipeIngredient: Pieces of apple, pear and banana and popcorn, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Put butter, sugar, and golden syrup into a saucepan.
2. Heat gently until the mixture begins to bubble, stirring occasionally.
3. Allow to boil for 1 minute.
4. Stir in evaporated milk and cook for 3-4 minutes until the sauce is hot and bubbling.
5. Add chopped nuts.
6. In a small bowl, blend cornflour smoothly with 2 tablespoons water.
7. Add this mixture to the sauce in the pan and heat until thickened, stirring.
8. Pour into a fondue pot and place over a burner to keep warm.
9. Serve with pieces of apple, pear, banana, and popcorn. (Serves 4-6)
